summary: The aiops-demo Service had no endpoints because its selector did not match the running pod labels. AIOps created a GitHub PR, a human merged it, GitOps validation passed, Argo CD synced, and the Service recovered.
root_cause: The Kubernetes Service selector used app=wrong-aiops-demo, but the running pod label was app=aiops-demo. Because the selector did not match any ready pods, Kubernetes could not create Service endpoints.

decision.reason: The issue was a deterministic manifest-level selector mismatch in an isolated demo namespace.

action.description: AIOps created a GitHub PR to change the Service selector from app=wrong-aiops-demo to app=aiops-demo.
